title: Fix(quadlet): Deduplicate removal files for .app expansion (#27653)
body:
- [x] Certify you wrote the patch or otherwise have the right to pass it on as an open-source patch by signing all
commits. (`git commit -s`). (If needed, use `git commit -s --amend`).  The author email must match
the sign-off email address. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#sign-your-prs)
for more information.
- [x] Referenced issues using `Fixes: #00000` in commit message (if applicable)
- [x] [Tests](https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/main/test#readme) have been added/updated (or no tests are needed)
- [x] [Documentation](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/README.md) has been updated (or no documentation changes are needed)
- [x] All commits pass `make validatepr` (format/lint checks)
- [x] [Release note](https://github.com/kubernetes/community/blob/master/contributors/guide/release-notes.md) entered in the section below (or `None` if no user-facing changes)

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

Fixes: #27653

 It cleans up the file removal process in `QuadletRemove` and fixes  an issue where we could potentially try to delete the same file multiple times. **No tests are required for this fix**.

This change is purely an internal refactoring that cleans up existing logic and addresses a small potential bug (duplicate deletions). Since it only improves the code's internal logic and doesn't change any end-user functionality or output, the end-user won't notice any changes.

What I did:

Fix: I introduced a tracking map (`map[string]struct{}`) to reliably keep track of every `quadlets`, `.app`, or `any file` being scheduled for removal. This ensures we only attempt to remove each file once, making the process cleaner.

Clean-up: I noticed the code was repeating the same logic (checking if a file was in the map, then adding it) in several places. I moved this into a simple, dedicated function called `addIfUnique`.

Result: The main `QuadletRemove` function is now much easier to read and maintain, as we've replaced verbose checks with a single, clear function call. No functional changes other than the fix for duplicate removal attempts.

**Please be aware**: I have related PR #27694 concerning `quadlet removal` that also modifies this file.
Since the second fix (which will require dedicated tests) resolves a separate issue, I am keeping it in a separate PR to maintain a focused review here. Once this PR merges, I will rebase the second issue's branch and push it forward. I will also include a cross reference note in that subsequent PR.

For more information see [the Code Review Process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process). The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

We don't need the `addIfUnique` function anymore. I'm going to refactor `removeList/expandQuadletList` into `removeSet/expandQuadletSet` to handle deduplication. So, I think we should skip this PR and I'll just merge everything into PR #27647
